He had always hoped his fated mate would be a vallant warrior- not some fleshy Ooman.
---
A lovely commission by Michael Polk! Oh my goodness, you were speaking my LANGUAGE on this one, I love Yautjas so very much. (Totally didn't go on a weekend long research spree about them like 3 months ago...totally not.) And I hope you love it as much as I loved making it
